title: Snap slider thumb to configured step
body: Fixes #12. The drag handler now rounds the value to the nearest multiple of `step` before committing. Adds a regression test.

title: Clamp tooltip position once per show
body: Closes: #18. The tooltip now computes its clamped position a single time on show instead of every animation frame, removing the flicker.

title: Refactor focus-ring helper
body: Pure refactor of the shared focus-ring helper; no behavior change. See also #99 (not yet filed here).
